title: Vietnam
html:
Vietnam

Vietnam is the first major solo international trip in the corpus — summer 2022, two years before the China chapter and roughly a year before the Jordan/Israel/Egypt arc. The Vietnam stretch is also the trip that produced the densest cluster of stranger-encounter entries in the travel stories catalog — three distinct entries by name, more than any other country.

The trip-prep document is 2022 07 31 vietnam route prep (July 31 2022) — a route plan written from Grants Pass in the family-house basement-cleaning chores backdrop. The itinerary: Ha Giang Bike Tour, Ha Long Bay (Poem Mountain), Hoi An Lanterns, Sapa, Phong Nha caves, Nha Trang, Ho Chi Minh / Saigon. Mixed in with the Vietnam visa todo (✅), CS161B coursework, washing Lola, and "Stream east / Cracked streams" sports-streaming reminders. The itinerary is north-to-south end-to-end — Yahir was planning the full country, not a focused region. He was 19, two years into OSU, pre-Sam, pre-Brotein.

The lived Vietnam is in 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — three entries that bank the trip's mishap cinema:

  • "Getting lost in northern Vietnam and meeting Vu Van Ba" — the Ha Giang region, presumably during the bike tour.
  • "Wrong-highway in Vietnam, met Berkoo" — second wrong-turn-as-meeting story, both turning into named-relationship entries (which is itself rare in the catalog).
  • "Leaving Dutch Anna, then reuniting on a random island in Vietnam" — a romance-arc fragment with the random-island reunion shape Yahir clearly remembers as a punchline.

What makes Vietnam structurally important in the graph is that two of the three Vietnam entries produced named friends (Vu Van Ba, Berkoo) plus a documented romantic arc (Anna). The Vietnam mishap-density-to-named-relationship-conversion-rate is higher than India's (which produced Yoav and a Varanasi assault but no warm encounters), higher than Jordan/Israel's (the rogue credit union story with no relationships banked), and roughly even with Egypt (which produced white desert food poisoning with no named friends). Vietnam was the trip where getting lost worked for him.

The trip also establishes the pre-China chapter geography template: long, north-to-south, route-planned in advance, mishap-driven, friend-producing. The same template is what the China chapter later runs at six-month duration instead of summer length.

Source summaries

  • 2022 07 31 vietnam route prep
  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences
